Frequently Asked Questions
Q1. When did the Railway NFR Apprentices 2026 Online Application Process Start?
The online application process started on 20 July 2026 .
Q2. What is the Merit List for Railway RRB NFR Apprentices 2026?
The Merit List will Released on as per Schedule.
Q3. Where can I find the Selection Procedure for the Railway NFR Apprentices Online Form 2026?
The detailed Selection Procedure are available in the official notification. Candidates are advised to read the notification carefully for complete details.
Q4. How can I download the NFR Indian Railway Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF?
Candidates can download the notification through SarkariResult.com.
Q5. What is the last date to apply online for NFR Indian Railway Apprentice Online Form 2026?
The last date to apply online is 19 August 2026..
Q6. What is the last date to NFR Indian Railway Apprentice pay the application fee?
Candidates can pay the application fee up to 19 August 2026 .
Q7. How can I apply for Railway NFR Apprentice Online Form 2026?
Candidates can apply online through the official recruitment link available on SarkariResult.com (Since 2012) – Official Website of Sarkari Result® .
tables: Northeast Frontier Railway NFR Guwahati Various Trade Apprentices 2026 Apply Online for 6777 Post

Indian Railway Northeast Frontier Railway NFR has released Various Trade Apprentices 2026. Those candidates who are interested in this Railway Northeast Frontier Railway NFR Apprentices 2026  can apply online from 20 July 2026  to 19 August 2026 . Read the notification for Apprentices eligibility, post information, selection procedure, Details, age limit, pay scale and all other information.

NFR Railway Apprentices Apprentice Notification 2026 : Age Limit as on 19/08/2026 Minimum Age : 15 Years . Maximum Age : 24 Years Age Relaxation Extra as per Northeast Frontier Railway NFR RRC Guwahati Apprentice Recruitment Rules.
NFR Railway Apprentices Recruitment 2026 : Vacancy Details Total : 6777 Post
Class 10 High School Exam With Minimum 50% Marks and ITI / NCVT Certificate in Related Trade. For Trade Wise Eligibility Details Read the Notification.
